name: Halftone
description: A halftone ramp printed top to bottom — dots grow with each row, and the whole screen shivers as every dot re-jitters per seed.

code.style: --dot: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --rule: ( /* dot size ramps with the row, jittered by one emitted factor per cell */ --hd: calc((10 + 62 * @y / @Y) * @r(0.55, 1.25)); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: calc(@var(--hd) * 1%); left: calc(50% - @var(--hd) * 0.5%); top: calc(50% - @var(--hd) * 0.5%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--dot); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
